subcodes.first_line: Glory be unto Thee, O Thou through Whose remembrance the near ones have risen to make mention and give praise, and by Whose Name the sincere have been drawn unto Thee [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک یا من بذکرک قام المقربون علی الذکر و الثناء و باسمک انجذب المخلصون الی
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for women, @praise and encouragement, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @prayer for protection
